title: salvia sclareoides f. bullata
intro: Salvia sclareoides f. bullata, also known as the Mexican Clary Sage or Bullate Salvia, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains camphor, borneol, and salvene, with antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Salvia sclareoides f. bullata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve stress and anxiety, and promote a good night's sleep. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is often used in aromatherapy and natural remedies.
